title: polypodium sculpturatum
intro: Polypodium sculpturatum, also known as the Chinese Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polypodium sculpturatum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Polypodium sculpturatum is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
